claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A named non-modal dialog anchored to its trigger with logical placement, collision/flip, bounded scrolling, and deterministic dismissal/restoration.
semantics: Trigger is a native button with dialog popup relationship; Content is a named role=dialog surface.
The background remains operable and focus is not trapped; the explicit entry policy is none by default, first-interactive, content, or a contained initialFocusRef.
React Aria owns outside interaction, topmost Escape, flip/collision, and focus return; LayerManager registers the actual portal root so visual order matches dismissal order.
One Description is associated by a stable ID; Arrow is decorative.

messageKeys.context: Visible default Popover.Close text when children are omitted.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve the floating surface boundary and trigger focus.
preferences.rtl: start/end and inline alignment map from explicit provider direction, not locale.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Collision padding and available-height scrolling keep the surface inside the visual viewport.
